notes: [2026-07-01T12:03:57+00:00] Elevation model corrected per maps-agent feedback: ONE LEVEL = 19px (flat 64x64@50% face), matching how you terrace. Only 64x64 tiles (flat=1 level, raised=2 levels) are EXACT; 64x128 cliff/tall are SCENERY with fractional faces. Every manifest now carries per-tile + per-set base_y (footprint front tip) so you can BOTTOM-ANCHOR by base_y with no per-tile diamond correction. tiles[i] also has apex_y + face_px. Re-measured all 51 existing sets. README + config updated. For exact N-level cliffs, stack 64x64 tiles.
